Have you ever thought that Minecraft lacked Variation when it came to torches by only providing us with only Regular, Redstone and Soul Torches?

Well you guessed right, THEY DID.

 

I NOW PRESENT TO YOU......

 

TINTED TORCHES.

 

Tinted Torches is a mod that adds in the ability to dye torches to different colors.

Currently we have 75 colors.....HOW EXCITING!!!!


![recipe header](https://i.imgur.com/GwyWf5T.png)

Recipes can be viewed using Just Enough Items!!!

YOU ARE FREE TO USE THIS IN MODPACKS!!!!!







Wanna Help Support Me?
![promo](https://i.imgur.com/zlN9FE3.png)
